items.title: 12 Hidden Settings To Enable In Your Claude Code Setup
items.description: Build and deploy your own AI agents with Make → https://www.make.com/en?
extracted_patterns: Run Claude directly as a named subagent using the --agent flag to skip orchestrator overhead and delegate tasks to specialized agents immediately

Use path-specific CLAUDE.md rules inside .claude/ folder — rules load only when the matched file path is read, keeping agents focused on relevant instructions and avoiding instruction overload in large codebases
Split large CLAUDE.md files into path-scoped instruction files (e.g., frontend rules only load when working on React components) to prevent Claude from ignoring buried instructions
Pass --skill flag when running a subagent to inherit specific skills that subagents do not get by default
